reviews.review_description: I love this game. There’s a lot of one star reviews that say this game is nothing but a toxic wasteland with admin abuse but I’m here to clear some things up first of all a lot of the reviews were made about moderation and how it sucked and as an OG player, I can verify that it used to suck really bad badly before they had spawn but recently, they have been getting better with their moderation and added things like jail and more admins also people have been talking about admin which I want to say that there used to be a lot of abuse from a guy known as skeleton angel. He would TP players go to players bases and read them in much other stuff, but skeleton angel has changed a bit and no longer admin abuse well for some of the other admin they do occasionally spawn in weapons during fights, but it is not given  towards anyone specifically also people say you can’t just go out and make a base and that it is not a good Minecraft rip off, which I want to say that is a good Minecraft alternative not a rip off specifically towards Minecraft factions servers I love those reviews saying it wasn’t like Minecraft were made by bedrock players who didn’t know factions on Minecraft even was factions was made for specific players not chill Minecraft players if you would want something more like that I would recommend the studios other game wild VR if it’s not your style, don’t just give it a one star review

This game is fun but only if you have a faction team or group it’s sad that people glitch to steal your stuff but they do give aways and there is so much to do .All in all this game is a must to try and you will like it if you like Minecraft or like a challenge.

I started playing today and I think Factions is a decent game. However the constant "Lost Connection" can get annoying real quick. 

Community wise, everyone tends to be a crybaby over the littlest things.
For example, a guy killed me, took my bag, and dropped it in the void (So what). So when I did the same with him he started whining and all like "I'M REPORTING YOU TO THE MODS" which I've heard the game has a hierarchy / favoritism problem. Whether that's true, I don't know.
Games fun but a good chunk of the community are a bunch of crybabies

reviews.review_title: Worst game I’ve played so far.
reviews.review_description: I have never played such a horrible game in my entire life; first time I joined I heard a kid screaming the N word and people screaming Heil H!tler. When I tried asking anyone how do u play the game they just told me to f#ck off and left. Literally no guides as the latest guide was 5 F#CKING MONTHS AGO! I HAD TO LITERALLY ASK A GUY WHERE IS THE SKIN STORE JUST TO FIND OUT THEY ARE RENOVATING IT.  And before you say that I could just join their Discord it’s literally impossible, they say that their bio on TikTok has the link but it’s literally not there, wasted a f#cking hour of my time just searching for it. Then when I wanted to leave through the southwest corner exit I saw a massive swastika, also the land around spawn is literally uninhabitable and every meter or so is claimed by the same guy. I hope Wild VR doesn’t have the same issues but I’m not very optimistic. Also the admins are literally abusing their power jailing people for no reason while letting Neo Nazis free.

reviews.review_title: Mid game, read before playing ig
reviews.review_description: This game truly has great potential, but unfortunately it was wasted completely. First off for starters. Its another one of those “every man for themselves” pvp game rather then it being a minecraft ripoff, like they say it is in the tik tok account. Second if you even want a chance to contribute to the game, say goodbye to that because the moderators are crap. All of them have alot of favoritism and could care less about any other aspect of the game. If you dont know the mods good enough there is no point of trying to contribute. Even if you try it wont work because they will threaten to ban you when you get the chance to ask, the playerbase is equally as bad. Nobody is nice in this game and will call you every slur imaginable, if your someone who is trying to play peacefully, thats not possible. And to add the cherry on the cake, this game is just one big political joke with no rules, this game is fun at first but sooner or later you will see the real story. If you want to make a base. You cant because they will never read the discord , you want to build something in spawn, that either because either they ignore you or give their favorites a chance. This game tries to have a hierarchy but fails miserably at it because the game is so bad. If you prefer  to grief and destroy . This is the game for you because even though they say anything bad will get you banned, thats a lie. So do whatever you want. But if you think this game is good and this is your first time playing i highly recommend to play something else. This game is too complicated and you wont get anywhere in this game. And for anyone who thinks im just saying this solely because “im probably playing for the first time” im not. I test games and to be fair it was fun at the start, but i found out this game has no enforced rules, barely anyone good as in kind, mods are dog, and this game is a complicated mess. Would not recommend. I had every item in the game, how? By stealing and breaking all the rules. And i got away with it scott free only because they couldnt care less about some one who the mods didnt know. All blocks in the game, all weapons and totems. And zero consequences. Thats  proof that  if your the type of person who likes to grief and destroy. This game is for you it really is, because there will be zero consequences. This game has great potential but horrible mods who dont know how to handle a game. Im pretty sure everyone agrees with what im saying for whoever has played for like a week or 2. Anyways Thank you for reading and have a wonderful day
Snowy was a quality member of this game sure he was a bit racist but not in front of thousands of people maybe 1 or 2 . Daowd u have ruined the economical structure with his ban

reviews.review_title: This game Is lowkey MID af
reviews.review_description: This game is honestly bottom of the barrel when it comes to vr Minecraft ripoffs, hell you can't even call it a ripoff with the way it ruins or just doesn't have most of the fun and unique features from Minecraft. like bro I've been stuck in a hole for a while now and so have many other people but the dev still hasn't done anything, and also why are there no settings? Like actually just add a settings  menu with a button to go to spawn then not only do you not have to dig a hole for 10 minutes to go to spawn but also if you're trapped like me you can just go to spawn, welp this is the end of my rant of this crappy dumpster fire of a game but also the mods are genuine pieces of garbage that don't deserve love or attention. Anyway thanks for reading I love you Mwa.
5 stars

bro as soon as i did the tutorial i got telleported underground and wasn't able to break out i kept on calling the admins but no one answers i even redownloded me game and nothing changed so i literally had to spam the n word to get the admins attention and when he apeard he jaild me i didn't even play the game and i am allredy in a jail this game is not fun.

The game is good, but if you want to leave spawn,

So like don't download it

I've been playing this game for a while now, when I started everyone was very friendly and very inviting, when I first joined I didn't know what to do but then I get on the next day and was already in a faction with great people, I now am rich and have made many long term friends, I would highly recommend this game if your looking for something addictive or just a fun to play game when your bored, also some of the devs may be corrupt sometimes but most of the time they do many giveaways there almost always online and the game is just super fun in General.
The game seemed great at first but I got trapped in a wall and now I can't play. I have uninstalled the game and everything and I am still stuck. Over all not good. FIX YOUR GAME!!

reviews.review_title: Its ok but the toxicity is overwhelming
reviews.review_description: The game is fun to play with friends exploring and building are all good in this game plus i love  the updates and crafting. But i dare say the player base is way more toxic than gorilla tag. First day on and i got called a slave a n and they just tormented me just because i asked for help figuring out the game. so instead me and my friends after being stalked and killed over and over aging we decided to just leave the town area and  build our own base i hate the player base but i love the game

I saw this game on YouTube, so I thought “hmmm, my brother likes Minecraft, so let’s play it!” So we did, but there’s no mining NOR CRAFTING AT ALL! 


But to make it redeemable, a list of things for the devs to add

Single player servers (and the ability to add your friends to it)

Smelting things like iron or gold

And, mobs that spawn at night

reviews.review_title: I'm an OG and I'm being treated awful
reviews.review_description: Ive been playing this game for a very very long time even before spawn was a thing I was there before these new moderators and I'm being treated horribly by them and the community I get ignoring everywhere I go I wish your game could be better I'm disappointed in your Moderation system and your community.
I got this game for me and a friend to play, and already I had so much fun we built a bass, and I got a badge. It did take me a while to get a hang of the game.

The game is okay but no perfect. The community is centered around making it political rather than being free and open game, people who play the game is either racist or highly rude and trolls a lot and It’s impossible to have a base longer than two days without it getting griefed. The game doesn’t influence going out of spawn and is keeping its core mechanics like trading in spawn instead of letting people build outside. If you want to play Minecraft in vr this is maybe an option but unless you’re willing to play with trolls I don’t recommend.
I'll give 3 stars for the idea of the game anything else is 1 star. Look if you added Snap or smooth turn instead of actually having to turn your body then maybe I would give 5 stars

The game is fun, but there are a bunch of people in the community who are just racist and say some horrible things, also in this game you can sue people. The only problem about that is they do absolutely nothing anyways, say the n word? No ban just a few days in a prison that you can easily break out of. I have recordings of people saying the n word and people calling me a d1ld0 which I sent into the general chat of their discord server to spread  awareness of these kinds of people, little did I know the next day that very same video would be posted as b-roll for one of their TikTok videos. The people who are responsible of  keeping this game moderated cannot do that and decide to ignore it even though there are literal children saying the n word. Anyways to those who have read this thank you for taking the time out of your day to read this.
Game is fun, but you can only build and not do survival mode and similar things. I like how when you leave the game it’ll put you in the same spot you left when you join back.

I have been in this game on multiple occasions and have heard the N word, people told to kill themselves, people praising h*tler, all while staff are present in the game. Dont believe me? download the game and play for more than 2 hours and you'll see what I mean. This game needs taken down from the store!
